case_title: DAVID KAI-YING CHOU VS. ANNE G FRANKEN et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOU, DAVID KAI-YING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANKEN, ANNE G DOE, ANTHONY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1468 VALENCIA STREET, APT. 5, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94110, LEASE FORFEITED, ** INCLUDING ANY/ALL UNKNOWN-UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES **SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FRANKEN, ANNE G DOE, ANTHONY

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOU, DAVID KAI-YING SERVED FEB-28-2014, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 2 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT FRANKEN, ANNE G DOE, ANTHONY
